case_title: CENTURY NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY, AS vs. FLORES, MIGUEL et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTURY NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY, AS SUBROGEE FOR BLANCA HOLCOMB AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, MIGUEL DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-31-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-03-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-11-1995

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-31-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE SANCTIONS STAYED. CASE TO BE DISMISSED. WHEN DISMISSAL IS FILE CASE WILL GO OFF THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR. HEARING SET FOR OCT-02-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PHOTOCOPY FOR 1 COPY FOR CASE NUMBER 114572. PLTF COPY. FOR PLAINTIFF CENTURY NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY, AS SUBROGEE FOR BLANCA HOLCOMB
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTURY NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY, AS SUBROGEE FOR BLANCA HOLCOMB
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-31-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR AUG-01-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-01-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-01-1995, SECOND OSC; WHY COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS CASE OR TAKE OTHER APPROPRIATE ACTION FOR PLTF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR AND FILE A PROOF OF SERVICE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-28-1995 CONTINUED FROM AUG-01-1995 TO AUG-31-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
